titleStmt.title: SII 41.248: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 248. (A.R. No. 466 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: This records that the king granted the village of Kōṭṭūr alias Chōḻavichchādharachaturvēdimangalam in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam as tax-free dēvadāna to the temple of Tiruvālaṅgāḍuḍaiyār at Paḻaiyanūr in Mēṉmalai-Paḻaiyaṉūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa- maṇḍalam. The temple at Kōṭṭūr is referred to as Ilambayangōṭṭur-uḍaiyār. Reference is also made to the Revenue Survey of the village in the 16th year of the reign of Sungandavirtta Kulottunga-Chōḻa [I]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravartti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalai
ppaḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil śrīmāheśvarakkāṇi cey
vvārkaḷukkum tevakaṉmikkum koyiṟkaṇakkaṉukkum Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu 100*3 100 4 10 2 mutal veṇṭum
nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka maṇaviṟ koṭṭattuk kaṉṟūr nāṭṭuk koṭṭurāṉa coḻaviccātira ccaturvvedimaṅkalam Ivvūrtti
ruvilampayaṅkoṭṭuṭaiyārkkuttevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilam nikki nilam nūṟṟupatteṭṭu muṉṟumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi
yum patiṉoṉṟāvatu pacāṉmutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭum tiruvilampayaṅkoṭṭuṭaiyārkkuc cuṅkantavirtta kulo
ttuṅka coḻatevarkkuppatiṉāṟāvatu A[ḷanta kaṇakkuppaṭi śrīkoyilum tirumuṟṟamum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum tīrttakku
ḷamum tirunantavaṉamumāṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa Aivelinilam niṅkalāka Aṉupavikkavum Ivvūril tevarkaḷukku Ūrkkiḻ I
ṟaiyiliyāṉa nilampaḻampaṭiye Iṟaiyiliyāy niṟkavum kaṭavatāka variyilārum varikkūṟu ceyvvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa U
ḷvaritaraccoṉṉom tiruvilampayaṅkoṭṭuṭaiyārkku śrīkoyilum tirumuṟṟamum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum tirttak kuḷa
mum tirunantavaṉamumāṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa Aivelinilam niṅkalāka nikki nikki niṉṟa nilam patiṉoṉṟāvatu pacāṉ mutal te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu nivantañ celuttavum paṇṇi Ivvūril tevarkaḷukku Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili
yāṉa nilam paḻampaṭiye Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāy niṟkavum paṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Ōlai rājentiraciṅkamuve
[nta ve*] ḷāṉ § Ivai nilakaṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai malayapparāyaṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai ṉuḷamparāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nantipaṉmaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vāṇādhi
rājaṉ Eḻuttu .. Itu śrīrājādhirājadevar prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉatirumukappaṭi Ivvūriṭuvittāṉ kūḻappiṭāraṉ .
Digital edition of SII 41.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
